assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: The response explicitly addresses compatibility checking with commands to verify current Istio version and mentions Istio's K8s N-2 support policy, plus includes guidance on when to upgrade Istio based on K8s 1.32 compatibility

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: The pre-flight validation section specifically includes checking the Istio 1.31/1.32 compatibility matrix with a reference to the official Istio supported releases documentation

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Phase 1 clearly states 'Only upgrade Istio if your current version doesn't support K8s 1.32' and provides detailed instructions for Istio upgrade before GKE upgrade

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: The response addresses webhook issues in the 'Common Mesh Upgrade Gotchas' section, specifically mentioning admission webhook certificate issues and sidecar injection version mismatches that occur during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: The response includes specific monitoring commands to check sidecar injection on new nodes and addresses sidecar injection version mismatch as a common gotcha with verification commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: The mesh-specific monitoring section includes commands to monitor proxy status and check for stale configurations, plus validation steps to ensure proxy consistency

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Multiple istioctl and kubectl commands are provided throughout, including 'istioctl proxy-status', 'istioctl analyze', and kubectl commands to check Istio versions and sidecar injection status

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: The response warns about cross-node mTLS failures and 503 errors during upgrades, explains the cause as new Envoy sidecars needing time to sync, and provides mitigation strategies like circuit breakers
